About
Me
01 — Introduction

I'm a final-year Computer Science student building scalable, modern web applications from front to back.

Specializing in the MERN stack and Django, I craft full stack solutions with clean architecture — from responsive UIs to robust RESTful APIs and secure authentication systems. My work sits at the intersection of engineering discipline and product thinking.

Beyond web development, I've applied machine learning to healthcare — building predictive systems using Random Forest models. I'm passionate about using technology to solve real problems with measurable impact.

Currently based in Bengaluru, Karnataka, and actively seeking Software Developer / Full Stack Developer roles.

BirthSense
A predictive healthcare system that determines Normal vs C-Section delivery likelihood using machine learning. Features role-based JWT authentication and an interactive interface for clinical data input and result visualization.
